windows.embed_text_v2: Finished cream soy candle burning in a clear mason jar on a granite countertop, single lit wick with a forming melt pool, side and top-down views; burn test result, no making.
windows.summary_v2: A finished cream-colored soy candle in a mason jar burns on a granite countertop while the camera moves from a side view to a top-down view of the lit wick and melt pool; a burn/result shot rather than candle making.

seconds_v2.desc: A finished pale-cream soy candle in a clear mason jar burns on a granite countertop, viewed from the side with the small flame glowing at the wax surface near the rim.
Same lit mason-jar candle on the speckled counter; the camera is slightly closer, flame flickering above the set cream-colored wax.
Side view of the burning jar candle continues, a shallow melt pool forming around the wick at the top of the wax.
Camera tilts upward on the lit mason-jar candle, the glass rim and flame coming into closer view over the cream wax.
Closer rising shot of the jar's threaded rim with the candle flame just behind it, wax surface mostly hidden below the lip.
View crosses over the rim to look down into the jar, the lit wick and forming melt pool now visible against the pale wax.
Top-down angle of the burning candle showing the single flame, blackened wick tip and a small clear melt pool in the cream wax.
Overhead shot of the lit wick and widening melt pool inside the mason jar on the granite counter.
Continued top-down view of the finished jar candle burning, flame centered over the glossy melt pool in the cream-colored wax.
